goals: No forced heavy JS load on generic first interaction
Lazy pane DOM and memory LRU cleanup
Runtime service-worker cache for repeat visits and pane fetches
CSS layout/paint containment for heavy content panes
notes: Upload the whole folder, not only index.html.
Service worker works on HTTPS/GitHub Pages or localhost, not normal file:// open.
The Cloudflare Worker proxy file is preserved as worker.js.
